mapper.select: SELECT * FROM roles WHERE deleted = FALSE ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM roles WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO roles (name, description, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE roles
name = #{name}, description = #{description}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE roles SET deleted = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
